title: Seedance 2.0 is finally available on Topview. If you have been following AI video, you already know Seedance 2.0 is in a league of its own. People waited a long time for this but It's here. Topview Agent V2 is built specifically for long-form video. Smart automation meets pinpoint control, studio-quality video of any length, for every industry. - Generate multiple AI-powered scenes inside one workflow - Unlimited video duration, not capped at 15 seconds - Agent V2 breaks your raw idea into a full structured storyboard automatically - Edit, rearrange, and refine scenes on a unified timeline - Business Annual accounts get 365 days of unlimited Seedance 2.0 access Intuitive enough for beginners, deep enough for pros . Sponsored by @TopviewAIhq 1/2
